What We Fix

Full-Service Auto Repair,
All Makes & Models

From a routine oil change to a complete engine swap — Floyd's team handles it all with the same honest approach every time.

❄️

AC Repair & Recharge

Our specialty. We diagnose AC issues correctly the first time — leaks, compressors, refrigerant recharge, and full system repairs.

Our Specialty
🔧

Engine Repair & Replacement

From head gaskets to full engine replacements, we tackle the big jobs other shops turn away. Done right, on time.

Major Repairs
🛞

Brakes & Suspension

Brake pads, rotors, axles, struts, and shocks — we keep your car stopping and handling like it should.

Safety First
🔋

Electrical & Battery

Battery replacement, alternator, starter, and electrical diagnostics. We'll find the issue and fix it — not guess at it.

Diagnostics
🛢️

Oil Changes & Maintenance

Quick, affordable oil changes and full routine maintenance to keep your vehicle running its best between bigger services.

Quick Service
🚗

Radiator & Cooling System

Overheating? Coolant leak? We service and replace radiators, hoses, water pumps, and cooling system components.

All Brands
Why Choose Us

Floyd Knows Your Car.
And He's Straight With You.

In a world full of upsells and surprise invoices, American Auto Repair runs differently. You get a straight answer, a fair price, and work you can trust.

  • 🤝

    No Upsells, No Pressure

    Floyd tells you what your car needs — and what it doesn't. He's turned away jobs he knew weren't necessary. That's rare.

  • 💰

    Fair Pricing, Every Time

    Competitive rates on parts and labor. Free pre-purchase inspections available. Discounts on parts and labor for new customers.

  • 🏆

    AC Expertise That Others Lack

    Our name says it all. We've been diagnosing and repairing auto AC systems for years — including the tricky ones nobody else will touch.

  • 📍

    Local to Santa Clarita

    We're your neighbors on Railroad Ave. When you bring your car to us, you're supporting a real local shop — not a national chain.

What Santa Clarita
Is Saying

Every word is from a real Google review. We let the customers do the talking.

★★★★★

"This is a great repair shop. I have used them several times over the last year from air conditioning repair, axle repair and most recently to replace our car engine. Floyd and his team are great. Their prices are fair, the staff are friendly, fast and efficient."

Jennifer C.
Via Google
★★★★★

"American Auto & AC is my go to for all my family's cars. Good service and the prices are more than fair given the personable experience. Floyd gets to know you and takes a practical approach to address each problem."

Local Customer
Via Google
★★★★★

"Floyd got my A/C blowing cold again — it was more than just a recharge. He noticed my battery had died while he was working on it so he charged it and changed my cabin filter. I was blown away. Great service."

Traveler from the Bay
Via Google
★★★★★

"I had an A/C Freon leak and couldn't find it. Floyd told me he was too busy but he would help me find the leak anyway. Within 5 minutes he found it and didn't even charge me. America needs more guys like Floyd."
